column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV `legal/eu/aiact` extension <-> ISO/IEC 42001:2023 (AI Management Systems) clause / control alignment. LLM-seeded candidate alignments (Claude Opus 4.7) connecting EU AI Act roles (Provider/Deployer/Importer/Distributor/Authorised Representative), risk-level taxonomy (Prohibited/HighRisk/LimitedRisk/Minimal/Permitted), system types (GPAI/GPAIModel), Annex III high-risk areas, conformity-assessment & post-market-monitoring concepts to ISO 42001 AIMS clauses (governance, AI risk treatment, lifecycle data/process control) and Annex A/B reference controls. Each row classifies as `semapv:LLMBasedMatching` per the Semantic Mapping Vocabulary and requires human review before promotion to `semapv:LLMBasedMatching`. Highest-leverage overlay for FINOS AI-governance use cases alongside `dpv-ai-iso42001.sssom.tsv`.
